speaker: speaker2
text: I'm going to buy a CD .

speaker: speaker1
text: Why not listen to music online ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Then I will have to pay quite a lot to listen to music on line , isn't it ?

speaker: speaker1
text: You can audition music on line , and you can audition it off line after downloading it , so you needn't pay for it .

speaker: speaker2
text: I have downloaded one , but it still can't be listened .

speaker: speaker1
text: In order to listen to music , you must have the necessary software .

speaker: speaker2
text: Can you recommend some to me ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , but you need install it after downloading so that you can use it .
